vllm.title: add option to shorten prompt print in log
vllm.author: leiwen83
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For now, model get big context support, and there is scenario that prompt would be very long, if we also want to kept a eye over the incoming traffic, then there will be huge log created.

vllm.title: Make `max_model_len` configurable
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Allows the user to override derived max_model_len if they so desire.
We can also warn the user if the max_model_len is set above what vLLM has derived - lmk if you think that's a good idea!
